# PERF-027 negative: bytes.Buffer is served from a sync.Pool on hot path
lang: go
file: PERF-027-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"sync"
)

var bufPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() interface{} {
		return &bytes.Buffer{}
	},
}

func EncodeChunks(chunks []string) string {
	var out bytes.Buffer
	for _, c := range chunks {
		buf := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
		buf.Reset()
		buf.WriteString(c)
		out.Write(buf.Bytes())
		bufPool.Put(buf)
	}
	return out.String()
}
